infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TrampoHero uses the camera to capture photo proof of completed jobs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TrampoHero uses your location to validate job check-ins.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TrampoHero needs access to your photo library to upload job completion photos.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: TrampoHero sends push notifications for new job offers and check-in reminders.

plugins.cameraPermission: TrampoHero uses the camera to capture photo proof of completed jobs.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TrampoHero uses your location to validate job check-ins.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TrampoHero uses your location to validate job check-ins.
